name: Lisinopril
explanation_en: ACE inhibition increases bradykinin causing cough and swelling.
explanation_ar: تثبيط إنزيم ACE يقلل من ضغط الدم.
how_it_works_en: Lisinopril relaxes blood vessels by blocking a natural substance that narrows blood vessels. This helps lower blood pressure and makes it easier for your heart to pump blood.
why_prescribed_en: Your blood pressure is high, and this medication helps protect your kidneys and heart while lowering your blood pressure.
treatment_goal_en: Lower your blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart disease; stroke; and kidney problems.
lifestyle_recommendations_en: Reduce salt intake; Exercise regularly; Maintain a healthy weight; Monitor your blood pressure
warnings_en: Take medications exactly as prescribed; Do not stop taking these medications without consulting your doctor; Report any side effects such as dizziness; swelling; or persistent cough.

name: Amlodipine
explanation_en: Relaxes and widens blood vessels to allow easier flow.
how_it_works_en: Amlodipine relaxes and widens blood vessels by blocking calcium channels. This allows blood to flow more easily; reducing blood pressure.
why_prescribed_en: It works well with Lisinopril to further lower your blood pressure and provides better control when used together.
treatment_goal_en: Lower your blood pressure and reduce the risk of heart disease; stroke; and kidney problems.
lifestyle_recommendations_en: Reduce salt intake; Exercise regularly; Maintain a healthy weight; Monitor your blood pressure
warnings_en: Take medications exactly as prescribed; Do not stop taking these medications without consulting your doctor; Report any side effects such as dizziness; swelling; or persistent cough.

name: Ramipril
explanation_en: Can lead to swelling due to ACE inhibition.

name: Valsartan
explanation_en: Leads to vasodilation causing BP drop.

name: Finasteride
explanation_en: Reduces male hormones affecting sexual function.

name: Sildenafil
explanation_en: Combining with nitrates causes dangerous BP drop.

name: Methotrexate
explanation_en: Suppresses rapidly dividing cells including immune.

name: Levodopa
explanation_en: Improves movement but causes involuntary motion.
